title: astragalus jelenevskyi
intro: Astragalus jelenevskyi, also known as the Jelenevsky's milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which may contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus jelenevskyi is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsules, or tincture, and is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe and Asia.
